<!-- Political Marketing Website Project -->
This is a modern political marketing website with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

## Project Structure
- HTML landing page with hero section, about section, policy highlights
- Professional CSS styling with political branding
- Interactive JavaScript contact form with validation
- Responsive design for all devices

## Key Features
- Hero section with campaign messaging
- About/Biography section
- Policy platform highlights
- Contact form with form validation
- Professional political styling theme

## Development Notes
- Use semantic HTML5 structure
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Professional color scheme (blues, reds, whites)
- Form validation with JavaScript
- Clean, modern political website aesthetics
